rationale: Postcondition is (set-equality antecedent on r1@ and r2@ map_values to_set) ==> r1 == r2 for Vec<CPacket>. Tried (1) empty proof body, (2) wrapping conjuncts in an if(antecedent) branch and asserting set-equality of map_values (which succeeded but doesn't yield Vec equality), (3) asserting r1@ == r2@ on the underlying sequences (failed). The function spec only constrains the set of packet views; two valid outputs may differ in ordering or contain duplicates while still satisfying the ensures clauses of retransmit_un_acked_packets, so r1 == r2 is not derivable from the antecedent. No combination of the supplied g_/k_ assumption guards strengthens the obligation enough to close it.
